name: Welcome Note
subject: Welcome to the GetSetLearn {{programme}} programme, {{schoolName}}
bodyMarkdown:
Dear {{recipientName}},

Welcome to the GetSetLearn {{programme}} programme. We are excited to begin this learning journey with {{schoolName}}.

Your sales contact {{salesOwnerName}} will be in touch shortly with the next steps. In the meantime, please refer to the signed MOU at {{signedMouUrl}}.

Warm regards,
{{senderName}}
GetSetLearn Operations
{{currentDate}}

auditLog.notes: Default Welcome Note template seeded by W4-I.5 Phase 3.
